vllm.title: [Misc] Apply a couple g++ cleanups
vllm.author: stevegrubb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This patch fixes the following g++ warnings
cache.cpp:88:26: warning: comparison of integer expressions of different
signedness: ‘int’ and ‘std::vectorat::Tensor::size_type’
{aka ‘long unsigned int’} [-Wsign-compare]
88 |   TORCH_CHECK(num_layers == value_caches.size());
pos_encoding.cpp:22:17: warn

vllm.title: [Core] Fix circular reference which leaked llm instance in local dev env
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Storing exception frame is extremely prone to circular refernece because it contains the reference to objects.
When tensorizer is not installed, it leaks llm instance because error frame has references to various modules which cause circular reference problem.
I also found spec decoding has a circul

vllm.title: [Speculative decoding] CUDA graph support
vllm.author: heeju-kim2
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We add a end-to-end test that verifies speculative decoding works with CUDA graphs. Specifically, we ensure that a model produces the same output when speculative decoding is enabled vs not, when cuda graphs are enabled.

vllm.title: [Core][Test] fix function name typo in custom allreduce
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The function name has been changed for quite a long time.
Meanwhile, when we only use a subset of gpus to test, we don't need to check the full nvlink connectivity.
